queue.title: Add backup substitution telemetry field to engagement-trace.json
Add TODO tracker false-positive rate metric to audit reporting
Switch prehook credential checks to account-manager --fast
queue.description: Now that account-manager supports --fast (3s timeout), hooks calling node account-manager.mjs test/json can use --fast for faster session startup. Candidates: 09-financial-check.sh, engage-blockers.sh, any credential preflight. Should shave ~5s off startup.

queue.title: Create hooks/lib/timeout-wrapper.sh for standard hook timeout behavior
queue.description: The pattern for fixing slow hooks is well-established: per-check timeout N, parallel background jobs, hook-level watchdog, graceful fallback. Create a shared library that any hook can source to get standard timeout+watchdog behavior with minimal boilerplate.

queue.title: Fix 02-periodic-checks.sh platform-health 100% timeout rate
queue.description: 02-periodic-checks.sh platform-health sub-check calls account-manager.mjs test --all with 10s CHECK_TIMEOUT. This command tests 51 platforms sequentially and exceeds 10s every time (confirmed via periodic-check-timing.jsonl: s20, s1780, s1800 all timed out). Fix: use account-manager.mjs test --all --fast (wq-871) inside this hook, or reduce platform count to critical-only subset. p95=10175ms, degrading trend. Prioritize alongside wq-871.

outcome.note: Added --fast flag + dedicated 15s timeout for platform-health (was 10s shared). Raised hook watchdog to 18s. Test confirms exit code 0 at ~10.1s instead of 100% timeout.
